John Doe 9:41 AM

Hey team! Has anyone tried the new CSS container queries yet? They're a game changer! 🎨

👍 2 🔥 1
SM
Sarah Miller 9:43 AM

Yes! Just refactored our card component using @container instead of media queries. So much cleaner!

MK
Mike Kim 9:45 AM

What about :has()? I heard it's finally stable in all major browsers now.

👀 1
AL
Alex Lee 9:48 AM

Absolutely! We're using it for parent selection. No more JavaScript for toggle states! Check out the demo repo.
